title: Scaffold Go backend service and configuration
acceptance_criteria: Go module initialized under backend/ with tidy dependencies and gofmt/go vet passing
Server boots via `go run ./cmd/server` and exposes GET /healthz returning 200
Configuration package loads OpenAI key and port from env/.env with validation errors for missing values
Project layout includes cmd/server, internal/server, internal/config plus .env.example documenting required variables
